command.text:
declare @vCode varchar(32), @vName nvarchar(512) select @vCode = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_mau_ct_dv' select @vName = case when @@language = 'v' then rtrim(ten_mau_ct) else rtrim(ten_mau_ct2) end from dmmauct where ma_mau_ct = @vCode
if @vName is null select @vCode = '', @vName = '' select 'this._vCode=''' + replace(replace(@vCode, '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';this._vName=''' + replace(replace(@vName, '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';activeForm(this);' as message return

declare @message nvarchar(4000), @taxCode varchar(32), @taxAccountName nvarchar(512), @taxAccount varchar(32), @taxRate numeric(5, 2), @taxType varchar(32), @taxTypeName nvarchar(512), @reportFormName nvarchar(512), @unitName nvarchar(1023) select @taxCode = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_thue_1' select @taxType = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_tc_thue' select @taxTypeName = case when @@language = 'v' then rtrim(ten_tc) else rtrim(ten_tc2) end from v20dmtcthue where ma_tc = @taxType select @reportFormName = case when @@language = 'v' then rtrim(ten_bc) else rtrim(ten_bc2) end from dmmaubc3 where mau_bc = '&DefaultReportForm;' select @taxAccount = a.tk_thue_no3, @taxAccountName = case when @@language = 'v' then rtrim(b.ten_tk) else rtrim(b.ten_tk2) end, @taxRate = a.thue_suat from dmthue a left join dmtk b on a.tk_thue_no3 = b.tk where a.ma_thue = @taxCode select @unitName = case when @@language = 'v' then ten_dvcs else ten_dvcs2 end from dmdvcs where ma_dvcs = @@unit
if not exists(select 1 from dmthue where ma_thue = @taxCode) select @taxCode = '', @taxTypeName = '', @taxRate = 0 if @taxAccountName is null select @taxAccount = '', @taxAccountName = '' if @taxTypeName is null select @taxType = '', @taxTypeName = ''
select @message = 'this._taxCode=''' + rtrim(@taxCode) + ''';this._taxAccount=''' + rtrim(@taxAccount) + ''';this._taxAccountName=''' + replace(replace(@taxAccountName, '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';this._taxRate=' + rtrim(@taxRate) + ';this._taxType=''' + @taxType + ''';this._taxTypeName=''' + replace(replace(@taxTypeName, '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';this._reportFormName=''' + replace(replace(@reportFormName, '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + '''' select @message = @message + ';this._unitCode=''' + @@unit + ''';this._unitName=''' + replace(replace(isnull(@unitName, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';initForm(this);' &CommandWhenInvoiceBeforeEdit; select @message as message return
declare @message nvarchar(4000) select @message = 'initForm(this);' &CommandWhenInvoiceBeforeEdit; select @message as message return
&CommandListCheckTaxCodeWarningMessage;, @stt_rec as stt_rec else select @stt_rec as stt_rec return

update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec
&CommandListCheckTaxCodeWarning;

action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmkh where ma_kh = @ma_kh and cc_yn = 1) begin select rtrim(ten_kh) as ten_kh, rtrim(dia_chi) as dia_chi, rtrim(ma_so_thue) as ma_so_thue from dmkh where ma_kh = @ma_kh return end

if exists(select 1 from dmthue where ma_thue = @ma_thue) begin select a.thue_suat, rtrim(a.tk_thue_no3) as tk_thue_no3, rtrim(a.ten_thue%l) as ten_thue%l from dmthue a left join dmtk b on a.tk_thue_no3 = b.tk where a.ma_thue = @ma_thue return end
